ENTRY.C_GL: var cash=DV.getFieldValue('CHG_CASH_IND'); var currency = DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_LOCAL_CUST_CCY'); var acc= DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_LOCAL_CUST_AC_NO'); var size=acc.length(); if (size == 0 || cash.equals('Yes') ){ var country = DV.getCountryCode(); var sql = "item_c='006" + "'" + " and cnty_code='" + country + "'" + " and item_name='" + currency + "'"; DV.SYS_getTableData('FIELD_1_X','eximtrx.data_master',sql); } else { DV.appendField(acc); }
ENTRY.N_AMT: var dest=DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_ALL_CHARGE_FOR'); var amt = 0; if (dest.equals('F')){ amt=DV.toFloat(DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_FOREIGN_PAY_TOTALE_IN_PAYCCY')); }else{ amt=DV.toFloat(DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_LOCAL_PAY_TOTALE_IN_PAYCCY')); } var chg_amt=DV.toFloat(DV.getFieldValue("SECOND_CHG_AMT")); DV.writeLog("chg_amt"+chg_amt); if(dest != null && dest.equals('F')){ amt='0'; }else{ if(amt==chg_amt){ amt='0'; }else{ amt=amt-chg_amt; } } DV.writeLog("amt"+amt); DV.appendField(amt);

ENTRY.C_EXCHGE_RATE1: var dest=DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_ALL_CHARGE_FOR'); var rate=DV.getFieldValue('CHG_LOCAL_CUST_PAY_RATE'); if(dest != null && dest.equals('F')){ rate=DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FOREIGN_CUST_PAY_RATE');; } DV.appendField(rate);

ENTRY.C_GL: var cash=DV.getFieldValue('CHG_CASH_IND'); var currency = DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_LOCAL_CUST_CCY'); var acc= DV.getFieldValue('CHG_FLD_LOCAL_CUST_AC_NO'); var size=acc.length(); if (size == 0 || cash.equals('Yes') ){ var country = DV.getCountryCode(); var sql = "item_c='006" + "'" + " and cnty_code='" + country + "'" + " and item_name='" + currency + "'"; DV.SYS_getTableData('FIELD_1_X','eximtrx.data_master',sql); } else { DV.appendField(acc); }
